overall.description: Cyberpunk 2077 gameplay footage depicting a slow exploration through a narrow elevated walkway between futuristic skyscrapers, emerging into an open vista of Night City featuring a prominent multi-armed cybernetic statue holding glowing purple energy orbs. The scene transitions from enclosed shadow to sunlit openness, showcasing neon-lit buildings, distant flying vehicles, and high-fidelity cyberpunk aesthetics.

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a narrow elevated walkway between towering cyberpunk structures. To the left, a curved glass tower reflects the ambient light, while the center is dominated by a massive industrial ventilation shaft. The right side features rust-red metal paneling with glowing neon strips. The path ahead shows a bright opening suggesting an exit to a more open area.

emerges from shadow into warm golden hour sunlight illuminating the cybernetic statue and distant towers

dense cluster of futuristic skyscrapers and high-rise towers extending into the hazy distance
small aerial cars hovering between the distant buildings
tall structure covered in green and red holographic advertisements and Asian character signage

segments.scene_description: The scene opens dramatically as the camera exits the narrow passage onto a rooftop plaza. The multi-armed cybernetic statue becomes the focal point, holding glowing purple orbs against the backdrop of the sprawling Night City skyline. Warm golden sunlight bathes the scene, contrasting with the neon advertisements on a nearby tower. Flying vehicles can be seen navigating between distant skyscrapers.

scene_state.functional_zone: intimate view of cybernetic sculpture with active energy effects

events.description: camera slows significantly to focus on the intricate details of the statue's glowing orbs

agents.ego_description: closely examining the glowing purple energy orbs and mechanical details of the multi-armed statue

entered.detail: low-lying atmospheric steam or smoke drifting across the ground surface

segments.scene_description: The camera moves intimately close to the cybernetic statue, revealing the intricate mechanical details and the luminous purple energy orbs held in its multiple hands. Atmospheric steam drifts across the foreground while the city skyline remains visible in the background. The neon lighting from surrounding advertisements casts colored reflections on the statue's metallic surface.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a claustrophobic industrial corridor into a vast, sunlit urban vista dominated by a cybernetic monument. It begins within a narrow elevated walkway, gliding past a curved glass tower and a massive ventilation shaft flanked by rust-red metal and glowing neon strips. As the camera reaches the end of the passage, the scene opens dramatically onto a rooftop plaza where warm golden sunlight reveals the sprawling Night City skyline and flying vehicles navigating between skyscrapers. The perspective then shifts toward a multi-armed cybernetic statue, moving intimately close to reveal intricate mechanical details and luminous purple energy orbs. Finally, the camera lingers on the statue's metallic surface as atmospheric steam drifts through the foreground and neon advertisements cast colorful reflections across the scene.
